ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs South Australia (Day 1)
ranked_matches.time: LIVE (Starts today/tomorrow depending on time zone)

ranked_matches.title: ICC Men's T20 World Cup Africa Sub Regional Qualifier B

summary: The main cricket event today is the 5th T20I between New Zealand and South Africa, which is the series decider. The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is also scheduled to begin today or tomorrow. The AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 has concluded.
